content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the current delta in `src/cli/project.rs`, `src/contexts/milestone_record/bundle.rs`, and `tests/cli.rs`, including the relevant code paths end-to-end. I also ran targeted coverage with `cargo test explicit_id -- --nocapture`, `cargo test mismatched_explicit_bead_id -- --nocapture`, and `cargo test create_from_bead -- --nocapture`. I did not find any correctness, safety, or robustness issues in this pass.

## Amendments

None.
